title: DFC 'Counts As' Ship Entry
description: Data file for a ship class that counts as an existing class from one of the fleet PDFs.

fleet.description: Fleet the counts-as class belongs to.

type.description: Ship type (e.g. 'Light Cruiser'). Typically matches counts_as_type in practice.

rule_text.description: Full 'counts as' sentence from the PDF.

famous_ships.description: Named individual ships of this class. Often empty.

flavour.description: Flavour text. Often empty. Paragraph breaks encoded as \n.

counts_as_class.description: Class name this ship counts as, resolved from fleet data.

counts_as_type.description: Ship type of the counts-as class, taken from fleet data.
